title: 92% of Fund Managers Can't Beat This One Move
hook: You're paying a 'professional' to manage your money — and 92% of the time, a simple computer program beats them.
angle: The SPIVA data proves most active fund managers underperform index funds, yet people keep paying premium fees for inferior results
audience: Anyone with a 401k, IRA, or investment account paying high management fees
key_numbers: 92% of active funds underperform over 15 years
1.2% avg active fund fee vs 0.03% index
